Chat Completion via Native API

Source: R/chat.R
lms_chat_native.Rd

Direct interface to LM Studio's v1 Native endpoint. Optimized for stateful chats and hardware control.

Usage

lms_chat_native(
  model,
  input,
  system_prompt = NULL,
  host = "http://localhost:1234",
  simplify = TRUE,
  ...
)

Arguments

model

Character. The loaded model name.

input

Character. The user prompt.

system_prompt

Character. Optional system prompt.

host

Character. Server URL.

simplify

Logical. If TRUE, parses output to text.

...

Additional API arguments.

Value

If simplify = FALSE, returns a list representing the raw JSON response. If simplify = TRUE, returns a character string containing the model's text output.

On this page
